creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pav         2008-03-23 10:46:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/kissdx    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    multimedia/kissdx/files kissdx.in pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  A multimedia server for KiSS/Linksys media players that enables the player to
  browse through and play stored files in a wide range of video, audio and image
  formats.
  
  kissdx is a PC-Link clone based for the most part on kissd (which it now
  replaces), with added features for media playback, management, flexibility and
  more.
  
  WWW: http://kissdx.vidartysse.net
  
  PR:             ports/119672
  Submitted by:   Simon Riget <freebsd@paragi.dk>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.255     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +54 -0     ports/multimedia/kissdx/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/kissdx/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/multimedia/kissdx/files/kissdx.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/multimedia/kissdx/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/multimedia/kissdx/pkg-descr (new)
